name: Tsakos Energy Navigation Ltd Series E Fixed-to-Floating Rate Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Shares par value $1.00
summary: Tsakos Energy Navigation Ltd Series E Fixed-to-Floating Rate Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Shares are preferred shares issued by Tsakos Energy Navigation Limited, a provider of international seaborne crude oil and petroleum product transportation services. These preferred shares have a fixed-to-floating dividend rate and are perpetual, meaning they have no maturity date. The company is based in Greece.
